title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: The-Focus-AI/umwelten
summary: CLI tool for evaluating and comparing AI models across Google, Ollama, OpenRouter, LM Studio, LlamaBarn, and GitHub Models. Features robust error handling, cost tracking, memory-augmented chat, and dynamic test coverage.

title: Ayushman-Raghav/job-pipeline
summary: End-to-end AI-powered job-search automation pipeline using FastAPI, n8n, Docker, Google Sheets, and local LLM scoring via Ollama

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: ek33450505/claude-agent-team
summary: CAST: multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code with hook-enforced quality gates and observability.

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hostable, multi-LLM knowledge OS for individuals and teams. Gemini/Ollama, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration, AGPLv3 + commercial license.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 182 rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: cybaea/obsidian-vault-intelligence
summary: Obsidian vault intelligence

title: GoGoComputer/openclaw-workspace
summary: macOS 로컬 AI 자동화 — Docker + Ollama + OpenClaw 에이전트를 한 줄(./openclaw install)로 설치·관리. 8시간 강의 교재 포함. Local AI automation on macOS — install, manage & secure a self-hosted AI agent in one command.

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive AI Agent Memory — Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter as you use it. Hybrid search, neural memory graph, AI reranking, and web UI. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and Qdrant.

title: wildlux/Prismalux
summary: Piattaforma AI locale in C puro + GUI Qt6. Pipeline multi-agente, motore anti-allucinazione Byzantino, simulatore 66          algoritmi, matematica locale zero-token. Gira su Ollama. Zero cloud, zero abbonamenti.

title: prady4the4bady/prady-os
summary: Prady OS v1.0.0 — A Buildroot Linux distro with Prax, a 44-service local-first AI stack. Autonomous agent OS built by Pradyun, Dubai, UAE.

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: ginkida/rustyhand
summary: Agent OS in Rust — one binary, 37 agents, 26 LLM providers, 37 channels (Telegram/Discord/Slack...), MCP server, A2A protocol, 120+ API endpoints, web dashboard

title: ryanjames85/grom
summary: BYOLLM. AI coding assistant for VS Code that runs on your machine — agentic, private, zero friction.

title: dshills/prism
summary: Local-first AI code review CLI. Reviews git diffs, commits, ranges, and PRs using Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, or Ollama. Outputs text, JSON, SARIF, and Markdown. Pre-commit hooks, caching, multi-model compare mode, and CI-friendly exit codes.

title: siddsachar/Thoth
summary: Thoth - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: NadirRouter/NadirClaw
summary: Open-source LLM router & AI cost optimizer. Routes simple prompts to cheap/local models, complex ones to premium — automatically. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible proxy for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw. Saves 40-70% on AI API costs. Self-hosted, no middleman.
